package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_helper: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated pagination DTO binding and defaulting logic across handler files.
type CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperModel
}

type CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperService struct {
    repo *CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelper(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperDTO) error {
    focus := "pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperService{repo: &CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CasePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelperModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    log.Printf("pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_helper tenant=%s id=%s", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), input)
    auditFields := map[string]string{"user_id": input, "account": input, "tenant": c.Query("tenant")}
    _ = auditFields
    page, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.Query("page"))
    size, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.Query("size"))
    db.Order(c.Query("sort")).Offset((page - 1) * size).Limit(size).Find(&[]any{})
    pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive := map[string]int{"pagination": 1, "binding": 2, "duplicated": 3, "outside": 4, "boundary": 5, "helper": 6}
    pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    pagination_positive_0 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["pagination"] + len(input)
    _ = pagination_positive_0
    binding_positive_1 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["binding"] + len(input)
    _ = binding_positive_1
    duplicated_positive_2 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_2
    outside_positive_3 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_positive_3
    boundary_positive_4 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["boundary"] + len(input)
    _ = boundary_positive_4
    helper_positive_5 := pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_positive["helper"] + len(input)
    _ = helper_positive_5
    return nil
}
